query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: A nighttime photograph of an urban street corner with a multi-story brick building featuring a large projection of a woman's face with platinum blonde hair and red lips on its upper facade. The ground floor contains a Chipotle Mexican Grill with bright interior lighting and an outdoor umbrella. An OFFICE SPACE sign is mounted on the left side of the building. Traffic signals display red and green lights at the intersection, and additional storefronts with lit signage line the street. The dark sky contrasts with the artificial lights throughout the commercial scene.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A nighttime urban scene captured with intentional motion blur, showing bright red and white light trails from passing vehicles streaming across the lower frame. A multi-story brick building displays a massive stylized projection of a woman's face with platinum blonde hair and dark red lips across its upper facade, while the ground floor houses a Chipotle Mexican Grill with illuminated windows and an outdoor umbrella. An OFFICE SPACE sign is visible on the left side of the building. Traffic signals glow intensely at the intersection, and colorful storefront signs line the darkened street. The long exposure softens the car lights into dynamic streaks that contrast with the sharp architectural details and projection.
